code:
formula_1 = Variable('x')
formula_2 = Predicate('Cat', [formula_1])
formula_3 = Predicate('Animal', [formula_1])
formula_4 = Implication(formula_2, formula_3)
formula_5 = UniversalQuantification(formula_4, formula_1)
formula = End(formula_5)

formula_1 = Variable('x')
formula_2 = Variable('y')
formula_3 = Predicate('Dog', [formula_1])
formula_4 = Predicate('Cat', [formula_2])
formula_5 = Predicate('Chases', [formula_1, formula_2])
formula_6 = Conjunction(formula_3, formula_4)
formula_7 = Conjunction(formula_6, formula_5)
formula_8 = ExistentialQuantification(formula_7, formula_2)
formula_9 = ExistentialQuantification(formula_8, formula_1)
formula = End(formula_9)

nl: If someone is a bird, then they can fly.
code:
formula_1 = Variable('x')
formula_2 = Predicate('Bird', [formula_1])
formula_3 = Predicate('CanFly', [formula_1])
formula_4 = Implication(formula_2, formula_3)
formula_5 = UniversalQuantification(formula_4, formula_1)
formula = End(formula_5)
